mapper.sql: id, mobile, user_name, birthday, `name`, points, `password`, sex, face, login_time, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into `member` (id, mobile, user_name, birthday, `name`, points, `password`, sex, face, login_time, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{points,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

mobile,

mapper.update:
update `member`
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
points = #{points,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
face = #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update `member` set mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, points = #{points,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, face = #{face,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, login_time = #{loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into `member` (id, mobile, user_name, birthday, `name`, points, `password`, sex, face, login_time, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.birthday,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.points,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.face,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.loginTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update: update member set wallet = wallet - #{wallet} where id = #{memberId} and wallet >= #{wallet}
